Our Expertise

Comprehensive Rehabilitation

🦴

Orthopedic Rehabilitation

Expert recovery for joint, bone, and muscle injuries using advanced manual therapy.

⚡

Sports Injury Recovery

Get back in the game faster with targeted sports rehab and performance tuning.

🏥

Post-Surgical Rehab

Structured, guided recovery programs after surgery to restore full mobility safely.

🧠

Neurological Physiotherapy

Specialized care for stroke, Parkinson's, and nerve conditions focusing on independence.

👶

Pediatric Physiotherapy

Gentle, effective therapy for children's developmental needs and gross motor skills.

💡

Electrotherapy & Laser

Modern pain relief using advanced electrotherapy techniques and laser treatments.

Meet Your Expert

Dr. Aaditi Sharma

BPT, MPT (Orthopedics)

Dr. Aaditi brings precision, compassion, and cutting-edge clinical expertise to every session. Dedicated to not just treating symptoms, but diagnosing the root cause to ensure lasting recovery and a return to pain-free living.

  • Specialist in Orthopedic & Sports Rehabilitation
  • Certified in Advanced Manual Therapy
  • Personalized, 1-on-1 dedicated treatment sessions
